hero.title: Premium Product Development Studio — From MVP to Scale
hero.description: We are a growing tech collective focused on solving problems for startups and businesses with AI, design, development, and a strong community of rising talent. YES, we are building next-gen experiences.

services.title: We help create experiences that reflect your needs
services.mvpDesc: We build fast, functional prototypes and scalable products using modern tech stacks — React, Next.js, Tailwind, Supabase, and more.
services.teamDesc: Need extra hands? Our community connects you with trained junior talent, mentored by our core team — perfect for long-term support or sprints.
services.marketingDesc: We don't stop at launch. Our creative team supports you with brand identity, landing pages, pitch decks, content strategy, and campaign ideas to help you reach your audience.
services.automationDesc: From content agents to workflow automation and knowledge bots — we help you implement smart tools that save time and scale effortlessly.

home.title: Nexprove - Premium Product Development Studio | From Idea to Launch
home.description: Turn your startup idea into reality with Nexprove. We deliver MVP development, full-stack solutions, UI/UX design, and team extension services that help businesses launch faster and scale globally.
home.ogDescription: Turn your startup idea into reality. MVP development, full-stack solutions, and team extension services.

about.title: About Nexprove - Your Premium Product Development Partner
about.description: Meet the team behind Nexprove. We're a global product development studio helping startups and businesses build world-class digital products with modern technology and expert talent.
about.ogTitle: About Nexprove - Premium Product Development Studio
about.ogDescription: Global product development studio building world-class digital products for startups and businesses.

services.title: Our Services - Full-Stack Solutions & MVP Development | Nexprove
services.description: Comprehensive product development services: MVP development, UI/UX design, team extension, marketing support, and AI automation. Launch your product faster with Nexprove.
services.ogDescription: MVP development, UI/UX design, team extension, and AI automation services for startups.

contact.title: Contact Nexprove - Start Your Product Development Project Today
contact.description: Ready to build your product? Get in touch with Nexprove for a free consultation. We help startups and businesses launch successful digital products.
contact.ogDescription: Get in touch for a free consultation. Let's build your product together.

blog.title: Nexprove Blog - Product Development Insights & Industry Trends
blog.description: Expert insights on MVP development, startup growth, product design, and modern tech stacks. Learn from real-world case studies and industry best practices.
blog.ogDescription: Expert insights on MVP development, startup growth, and product design.

work.title: Our Work - Product Development Case Studies | Nexprove
work.description: Explore our portfolio of successful product launches. Real case studies showing how we help startups and businesses build and scale digital products.
work.ogDescription: Portfolio of successful product launches and case studies.

process.title: Our Process - How We Build Products | Nexprove
process.description: Discover Nexprove's proven product development process. From discovery to launch, we follow a structured approach that delivers results on time and within budget.
process.ogDescription: Our proven product development process from discovery to launch.
